data.title: DXS INTERNATIONAL PLC (AQSE: DXSP):  Trading Update
data.description: UK healthcare technology provider, DXS International plc, has released a trading update for the fiscal year ending on 30 April 2026.

data.title: Abivax Announces Full Exercise of Underwriters’ Option to Purchase Additional ADSs, Bringing Gross Proceeds of Offering to $920M (€807M)
data.description: Abivax has revealed that the underwriters have fully exercised their option to purchase additional ADSs. This decision has increased the gross proceeds of the offering to a total of $920 million ($807 million in Euro).

data.title: Nebius celebrates healthcare and life sciences innovators at expanded AI Discovery Awards
data.description: In Amsterdam, Nebius, an AI cloud company, revealed the champions of the AI Discovery Awards, highlighting startups leveraging AI to drive progress in healthcare and life sciences. The 2026 awards expanded to include Medical Devices and Medical Imaging alongside existing BioPharma, Genomics, and Digital Health categories. The addition of Medical Devices and Medical Imaging recognizes the increasing significance of AI in connected medical tools and diagnostic imaging, reshaping industries with inference-heavy tasks.

data.title: Metapack® Named OneStock's Strategic Delivery Management Partner
data.description: In London, a significant announcement was made today as Metapack, a prominent brand under ShipStation Global®, was appointed as a key strategic partner for delivery management by OneStock, a top provider of AI-powered Order Management Systems (OMS). This partnership aims to combine OneStock’s inventory orchestration with Metapack’s extensive global carrier network. This connected platform offers enterprise retailers a comprehensive solution from the moment an order is placed to carrier selection, label creation, and handling of branded returns. The collaboration between the two companies will streamline operations for retailers, enhancing efficiency and customer satisfaction.
JAPAN 20-YEAR BOND YIELD RISES 11 BASIS POINTS TO 3.775%

data.title: Anoto Proposes New Corporate Identity as INQ Group AB
data.description: Today, Anoto Group AB (publ) disclosed plans to seek approval from shareholders during the Annual General Meeting to rebrand the Company as INQ Group AB (publ) as part of its strategic evolution. This change aims to align the listed entity with its forward-thinking INQ brand. Additionally, the Board intends to suggest a 1:100 reverse share split to enhance the Company's share structure in line with its enduring strategic objectives.

data.title: Braun Launches the Next Generation of Electric Shaver With Braun NEVO Introducing a New Dawn of Smooth Touch
data.description: In Kronberg, Germany, Braun recently launched the Braun NEVO electric shaver, marking a new era in close shaving and smooth skin care. Boasting over a century of German craftsmanship, the NEVO offers innovative features including a stainless steel handle, AeroTouch™ Technology, and personalized display for a comfortable and precise shave. Braun's Head of Design, Oliver Grabes, expressed excitement about redefining the shaving experience. This product reflects Braun's commitment to quality and innovation.
Company repurchases 500,000 shares at $10 each. Total transaction value: $5 million.

data.title: Dividend payment ex-date of Aktsiaselts Infortar
data.description: Infortar Limited will distribute the initial dividends for the 2025 fiscal year at 1.51 euros per share in net amount. Shareholders eligible for dividends will be determined as of the record date on 8 July 2026, the closure of the settlement system business day. On 7 July 2026, the ex-date, the entitlement to dividends for the 2025 financial year changes. Starting from this date, individuals acquiring shares will not receive dividends for the aforementioned fiscal year on 15 July 2026.

data.title: Notice to attend Annual General Meeting in Anoto Group AB (publ)
data.description: Anoto Group AB (publ) has scheduled its Annual General Meeting (AGM) for Friday, July 31, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. The meeting will take place at Setterwalls Advokatbyrå, located at Sturegatan 10 in Stockholm, Sweden. Shareholders are urged to attend the AGM on time.
Vopak completes acquisition of majority stake in Green Energy Storage (GES) and takes final investment decision on 200 MW/ 800 MWh battery storage project in the Netherlands
MAISONS DU MONDE: Submission of 2025 Registration Document for Universal. Details undisclosed.

data.title: Annual report 2025/26: Bang & Olufsen reports a year of continued transformation, advancing strategic execution and global brand presence during its centenary year
data.description: In the 2025/26 financial year, Bang & Olufsen generated revenue of DKK 2.5 billion. This marked a slight decline of 1.6% in local currencies, aligning with the adjusted outlook. Despite ongoing geopolitical and macroeconomic challenges, the company achieved a record high gross margin of 58.2% and the highest gross profit in eight years. This reflects the continuous advancement in executing its strategy and bolstering its position in the luxury audio market. Throughout the year, Bang & Olufsen made enhancements to its retail network, operational model, and organizational agility. The company celebrated its 100th anniversary during this period.

data.title: NNS confirms continued support for Rembrandt II
data.description: NNS Holding (Cyprus) Limited, also referred to as the Offeror, has released a statement regarding the voluntary public offer it has made for all ordinary shares of OCI Global N.V. This offer is extended to acquire all issued and outstanding shares of OCI. The Offeror aims to secure full ownership of OCI through this transaction.

data.title: OCI N.V. statement regarding Oceanwood Capital
data.description: On July 2, 2026, OCI Global N.V. ("OCI") (Euronext: OCI) announced that Oceanwood Capital Management LLP informed the Company of their withdrawal notification to Vereniging van Effectenbezitters ("VEB") on July 1, 2026.
South Korea Vice Finance Minister: Economy is unlike 1997 crisis; dollar liquidity abundant.
South Korea Vice Finance Minister: We have no plan to impose sanctions on won NDF market.

data.title: Skanska rehabilitates Dock Bridge in Newark, New Jersey, USA, for USD 87M, about SEK 810M
data.description: Skanska, a construction company based in Stockholm, has recently announced a notable development in their business operations. They have successfully secured a contract with Amtrak for the Dock Bridge rehabilitation project located in Newark, New Jersey, USA. The contract holds a substantial value of USD 87 million, approximately SEK 810 million, and is set to contribute to the US order bookings for the second quarter of 2026. This new venture signifies a significant milestone for Skanska as they continue to expand their presence and undertake significant projects within the construction sector.

data.title: France plans to boost efforts against crypto wrench attacks hitting 77, with a new three-part security strategy.
data.description: The French Interior Minister, Laurent Nuñez, has announced a new three-part plan to enhance security measures for the cryptocurrency sector. The plan is described as "more ambitious" and aims to strengthen the protection of digital assets. This initiative comes as a response to the increasing threats and challenges faced by the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: TomTom and Transit Technologies partner to deliver enhanced fleet and logistics operations
data.description: Integration of TomTom Orbis Maps and Live Traffic is enhancing routing capabilities for transit, paratransit, and NEMT networks in the U.S. and Central America. This collaboration will significantly improve navigation accuracy and efficiency across these regions. The integration is expected to benefit numerous sectors, with key focus on enhancing transportation networks. This setup is poised to have a notable impact on routing operations, making travel smoother and more optimized for various users.
